GG0130E2_SHWR_BTHE_GOAL_CD GG0130E2 Self Care: Shower/Bathe Goal by Discharge Indicates the patient's goal to shower/bathe self by discharge. 06. Independent – Patient completes the activity by him/herself with no assistance from a helper.
